rows.label: qev025103_MSG0001
rows.name:
Tch! Are you here for a Grenade
Pizza too!? Sorry, but I can't
right now! I'm swamped![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0002
rows.name:
And yet these customers just keep
coming one after another... Damn it!
What the hell am I supposed to do!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_JNK0010
rows.name: Ask

rows.label: qev025103_SEL0011
rows.name: Question him about Duduma.

rows.label: qev025103_JNK0020
rows.name: Soothe

rows.label: qev025103_SEL0021
rows.name: Calm him down before asking questions.

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0003
rows.name: What? You're a messenger from Aqual!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Tch! I don't have the
luxury to chat right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0005
rows.name:
At this rate, this shop is going to be
crushed by these pizza-starved Ma-non![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0006
rows.name: How the hell can I stay calm![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0007
rows.name:
At this rate, this shop is going to be
crushed by these pizza-starved Ma-non![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0008
rows.name:
...What? You're a messenger
from Aqual!? Tch! I don't have
the luxury to chat right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0009
rows.name:
...I know! Hey, you! Could you deliver
a pizza to a customer for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0010
rows.name:
If you do, I'll tell you whatever
you want to know! Right? It's
fine, isn't it? Please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025103_SEL0031
rows.name: Listen to Powell's request.

rows.label: qev025103_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025103_SEL0041
rows.name: Refuse Powell's request.

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0011
rows.name: Ohh! That's a lifesaver! You're so kind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0012
rows.name:
Since that's decided, deliver this Grenade
Pizza to a Ma-non named Mikal right away!
He should be inside that Ma-non ship![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0013
rows.name:
He's a regular customer, so
make sure you aren't rude! Now
scramble! It's Army Pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0014
rows.name:
Heh, is that so! If you're just going
to get in the way, get out of here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0017
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, then.
Deliver this piping hot pizza
to Mikal on the Ma-non ship![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0018
rows.name:
While you do that, I'm going to bake,
and bake, and keep baking Grenade
Pizzas for these starving beasts![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0019
rows.name:
Phew... Things have finally settled
down on my end... Looks like you
finished your delivery safely, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0020
rows.name:
Man, a hungry group of Ma-non
are the absolute worst to deal
with... It was tough, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025103_SEL0051
rows.name: Complain to Powell.

rows.label: qev025103_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025103_SEL0061
rows.name: Say it was an easy job.

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0021
rows.name:
Sorry for making you do such an
unpleasant job. But you really saved me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0022
rows.name:
Ever since my wife passed away, it's
been like this all the time. I just
can't keep up with everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0023
rows.name:
Heh... Just how important of a
presence she was... to this shop...
I really feel it in my bones now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0024
rows.name: You... say things just like my wife did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0025
rows.name:
No matter how busy we were, she'd
always help out with this work
without a single look of disgust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0026
rows.name:
Heh... I remember it now. That
face of hers, always smiling no
matter how tough things were.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Oops, my bad! The shop has to
keep going tomorrow and the day
after. I have to look forward![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0029
rows.name: So, what was it you wanted to ask about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0030
rows.name:
Ask me anything. It's my thanks
for helping me with the work.
I'll answer any question![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_JNK0070
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev025103_SEL0071
rows.name:
Ask if there was anything
unusual about Duduma.

rows.label: qev025103_JNK0080
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev025103_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask about Duduma's lifestyle.

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0031
rows.name:
You say unusual, but... She ordered
pizza as usual and scarfed it down
with incredible ferocity...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0032
rows.name:
...Ah, Duduma is a Ma-non
regular at our shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0033
rows.name:
Well, she's someone who eats a
lot of pizza. She orders our
pizza about 10 times a week.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0034
rows.name:
Come to think of it, I haven't
received an order from her lately.
Did something happen to her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0035
rows.name: ...What?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Are you serious! That pizza-addicted
Ma-non jumped!? I can't believe it...
The only reason that comes to mind...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0037
rows.name:
...No, come to think of it, she got into a dispute
at our shop with a BLADE named Gerome over some
silly reason like their shoulders bumping.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0038
rows.name:
She seemed pretty down about it,
but... I can't imagine she'd die
over something like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0039
rows.name:
If you're investigating her, why
don't you try looking into that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0040
rows.name:
It seems Duduma was persistently
being picked on by Gerome, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025103_MSG0041
rows.name:
If you're investigating her, why
don't you try looking into that?[ST:wait ]
